title: Design and conduct a field-based research trial
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design and conduct a field-based research trial demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Design the trial

pcs.text: Identify purpose, subject and aim of the research trial
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose, subject and aim of the research trial?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose, subject and aim of the research trial.

pcs.text: Research available evidence to determine trial performance criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research available evidence to determine trial performance criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research available evidence to determine trial performance criteria.

pcs.text: Locate trial sites according to research trial design requirements, and identify and document site factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate trial sites according to research trial design requirements, and identify and document site factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate trial sites according to research trial design requirements, and identify and document site factors.

pcs.text: Identify and obtain approvals and permits required to conduct the trial
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and obtain approvals and permits required to conduct the trial?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and obtain approvals and permits required to conduct the trial.

pcs.text: Establish data collection and recording specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish data collection and recording specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish data collection and recording specifications.

pcs.text: Follow scientific and statistical methodology techniques and procedures to satisfy statistical analysis requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow scientific and statistical methodology techniques and procedures to satisfy statistical analysis requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow scientific and statistical methodology techniques and procedures to satisfy statistical analysis requirements.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks, and develop control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks, and develop control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks, and develop control measures.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with implementation of the trial, and document in the trial design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications associated with implementation of the trial, and document in the trial design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with implementation of the trial, and document in the trial design.

pcs.text: Identify and cost materials, tools, equipment and machinery required for the trial
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost materials, tools, equipment and machinery required for the trial?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost materials, tools, equipment and machinery required for the trial.

pcs.text: Document the trial design, specifications and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the trial design, specifications and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the trial design, specifications and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Design the trial

elements.title: Prepare and conduct the trial

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and prepare trial sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and prepare trial sites.

pcs.text: Undertake staged data collection throughout the course of the trial
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake staged data collection throughout the course of the trial?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake staged data collection throughout the course of the trial.

pcs.text: Monitor trial implementation for compliance to the trial design and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor trial implementation for compliance to the trial design and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor trial implementation for compliance to the trial design and specifications.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record monitoring and trial data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record monitoring and trial data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare and conduct the trial

elements.title: Review, assess and document trial outcomes

pcs.text: Review and analyse trial data and outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and analyse trial data and outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and analyse trial data and outcomes.

pcs.text: Determine conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess trial outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess trial outcomes.

pcs.text: Document and report trial purpose, outcomes and conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and report trial purpose, outcomes and conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report trial purpose, outcomes and conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Review, assess and document trial outcomes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
